description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, metallic head with a cross-peen design, where one side is a flat striking face and the other tapers to a wedge-like peen. The head is made of a dark, weathered metal, showing a slightly rough texture and some surface marks. The handle is straight, constructed from light-colored wood, and appears thick and sturdy, suitable for absorbing impact. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the head securely mounted atop the handle. There are no visible ergonomic enhancements or grip textures on the handle, giving it a traditional, utilitarian appearance. The hammer shows signs of use, with minor scuffs and discoloration, but no major damage or attachments.
description: A sturdy cross-peen hammer with a weathered metal head and a straight, thick wooden handle. The tool shows minor wear and a utilitarian, traditional design.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the narrow end, showing the width of the head and the straight alignment of the handle beneath it.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the cross-peen head, with the flat striking face on the left and the wedge-shaped peen on the right, as well as the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end view displays the rectangular face of the hammer head and the straight handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, again showing the cross-peen head with the peen on the left and the striking face on the right.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, thick, smooth, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: cross-peen hammer head, one flat striking face and one wedge-shaped peen, made of steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: minor scuffs and discoloration visible, no major damage
